emails.body:
From: Account Security <support-phish-001@secure-mail.example>
To: LCDR James Maddox <james.maddox@jiaitf.example>
Date: Wed, 30 Sep 2026 22:44:00 -0400
Subject: Action required #1

Your network password is scheduled to expire in 24 hours.

To maintain uninterrupted access to JIAITF systems, you must update your credentials immediately. Click the link below to reset your password:

https://secure-mail.example/password-reset?token=PHISH-001-001

If you do not reset your password before the expiration deadline, your account will be locked and you will need to contact the help desk for manual unlock.

This is an automated message from the Account Security team. Do not reply to this email.

--
Account Security Operations
Joint Interagency Task Force Support
